rationale.R1.1: Identifies the conflicting central contributions and proposes a clear reframing, demonstrating strong conceptual reconstruction.
rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent section reorganization plan with two possible structures, though not fully detailed for each section.
rationale.RX.1: Effectively flags uncertainties in claims and suggests improvements, marking confidence and evidence gaps thoroughly.
rationale.RX.3: Generally within scope but with minor drifts, such as extensive focus on citations.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids introducing errors and identifies harmful patterns in the original text, ensuring no regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but leaves minor edits unannotated, lacking full traceability.
